description: Iteration / convergence rules, run-mode thresholds, and search-budget caps. Loop 7 (iterative-refinement) reads this between every refinement pass and stops when criteria are met OR max_passes is hit. Loop 0 reads cold_after_days / delta_after_days to decide run mode.

conditional_loops.5: Run Loop 5 (adversarial) ONLY if a Loop 4 rescore crosses a conviction-tier boundary or flips an opportunity's lifecycle state vs its prior canonical. Otherwise skipped to keep delta runs fast.

search_budget._note_loop_7: loop_7 is the iteration controller; it issues 0 searches of its own. The budget attributed to it in metrics.json is the SUM of re-dispatched Loops 4-6 across passes 2..N. per_cycle_total_cap bounds the whole cycle including all iteration passes.
